message:
Remove duplicate clippy lint and add multi-worker outcome equivalence test

The lib.rs had a duplicate #![cfg_attr(test, allow(clippy::large_stack_arrays))]
attribute that was causing a redundant annotation.

Added a new test `test_parallel_lab_equivalent_to_single_worker_outcomes` that
verifies deterministic execution produces identical completion counts between
single-worker and multi-worker LabRuntime configurations:
- Extracts helper `run_and_collect_counts()` for scheduling tasks and collecting
  completion counters
- Uses seed 9001, 37 tasks, 3 yields per task
- Asserts each task completes exactly once in both configurations
- Validates that single-worker and multi-worker runs are outcome-equivalent

This strengthens confidence in the deterministic scheduler when parallelism
varies, which is critical for reproducible simulation testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
